name: Wooting
description: Dutch maker of Hall-effect keyboards and the originator of rapid-trigger for PC gaming. The Wooting 60HE and Wooting 60HE+ are the benchmarks the rest of the analog-input category measures against: per-key actuation depth, analog axis output to games, and the most mature rapid-trigger firmware stack in the segment. Wooting's software has a multi-year head start on configurator depth that newer HE entrants are actively closing.
